mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_type, name, description, is_default, sort_order, item_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_folders (id, user_id, user_type, name, description, is_default, sort_order, item_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userType}, #{name}, #{description}, #{isDefault}, #{sortOrder}, #{itemCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE favorite_folders SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, is_default = #{isDefault}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, item_count = #{itemCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM favorite_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = #{userType} AND is_default = TRUE LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_folders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = #{userType}
